title: HardCold + PojavLauncher
description:
This is a horror build designed to scare you. It has many popular horror mods. 

And the main feature is the PORT FOR POJAVLAUNCHER (v1 and v2 only)!!!!!!!
body:
- [**Available for mobile devices**](https://pojavlauncherteam.github.io/)
- [**My other builds**](https://sites.google.com/view/maxzotoproject/%D0%B3%D0%BB%D0%B0%D0%B2%D0%BD%D0%B0%D1%8F)
### 

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1be1d4a1bc1425e0335598d8a0a2ed567e3171f1.png)


> To play on PC, download the version labeled **"PChost"**

> To play on a mobile device, download the version labeled **"mobile"** version 
### THE GAME IS FOR WEAK DEVICES NO HIGHER THAN 2.0


There is not much difference between the editions, but the PC version has improved the creation of servers and the ability to enable shaders! (**You can play online on your phone, but there may be errors**)

 This is a horror build designed to scare you.  There is a special version for weak devices(POJAVLAUNCHER)!



<details>
 <summary>Winter Update</summary>
  
## HERE IS A STRIPPED-DOWN VERSION OF THE FULL https://goo.su/s8USBQ


### All new monsters
### The whole world is covered with darkness and snow
### Updated shaders
### A little optimization
### Scary atmosphere mods
### New sounds and music (HERE IS A STRIPPED-DOWN VERSION OF THE FULL https://goo.su/s8USBQ)
### New resource packs
### Working on the menu and interface
### New generation system
### Mods to improve the gameplay
###
